Class BillDAO

java.lang.Object
DB.DBController
DAO.BillDAO
public class BillDAO extends DBController
Data Access Object (DAO) for managing Bill entities in the database. This class provides methods to retrieve, insert, and link bills to reservations, extending DBController to handle database connectivity.

    • BillDAO

      public BillDAO()

  • Method Details

    • getBillById

      public Bill getBillById(int billId)
      Retrieves a specific bill from the database using its unique bill ID.
      Parameters:
      billId - the unique identifier of the bill to retrieve
      Returns:
      a Bill object if found, otherwise null

    • getBillByReservationId

      public Bill getBillByReservationId(int reservationId)
      Retrieves the most recent bill associated with a specific reservation ID.
      Parameters:
      reservationId - the ID of the reservation linked to the bill
      Returns:
      the latest Bill found for the reservation, or null if none exists

    • GetBill

      public Bill GetBill(int billId)
      Retrieves a specific bill by its ID. * @param billId the bill ID
      Returns:
      the Bill if found, or null if not found

    • AddBill

      public Boolean AddBill(Bill b)
      Inserts a new bill into the database and links it to the corresponding reservation. This method first checks if a paid bill already exists for the given reservation to prevent double billing. If valid, it inserts the bill and updates the reservation record with the new Bill ID.
      Parameters:
      b - the Bill entity to be inserted
      Returns:
      true if the bill was added and linked successfully, false otherwise

    • updateReservationBillId

      public boolean updateReservationBillId(int reservationId, int billId)
      Updates the reservation record to link it with a specific bill ID.
      Parameters:
      reservationId - the ID of the reservation to update
      billId - the ID of the bill to link
      Returns:
      true if the reservation record was successfully updated, false otherwise
